Quests.Battle_of_the_Ages: If either Slayer or Challenger kills one another, they will be granted the Legendary title.
Quests.Flames_of_the_Ancient: If either Phoenix or Dragon kills one another, they will be granted the Immortal title.
Quests.Song_of_the_Sea: If either Fisherman or Pirate kills one another, they will be granted the Sovereign title.
Quests.Judgement_of_the_Heavens: If either Warrior or Wrath kills one another, they will be granted the Exalted title.
